case.title: DIXIE FEED & SEED CO., v. BYRD

opinion.h1: DIXIE FEED & SEED CO., v. BYRD, 379 U.S. 15 (1964)
opinion.h4: DIXIE FEED & SEED CO., INC., ET AL. v. BYRD. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF TENNESSEE. No. 311. Decided October 19, 1964.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
W. Neil Thomas, Jr., for appellants.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.

379 U.S. 15 BOINEAU ET AL. v. THORNTON, SECRETARY OF STATE OF SOUTH CAROLINA, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF SOUTH CAROLINA. No. 483. Decided October 19, 1964.
Daniel R. McLeod, Attorney General of South Carolina, and Clarence T. Goolsby, Jr., and Everett N. Brandon, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
